execution_evidence.output_quality: Good — professional tone, real metrics, structured email
issues: Stage classified as implement instead of report — caused unnecessary approval gate
Placeholder [Investor Name] not replaced — deliberation should instruct to use operator name or remove placeholder
Domain routed to topranker (correct given content, but writing engine would be better for generic writing tasks)

context_assessment.notes: Routed correctly to personalops. Operator priorities injected. But: board created report subtask requiring approval (GAP-002 still hits some cases). Output is generic weekly plan without TopRanker-specific milestones.

execution_evidence.output_quality: Adequate — has time blocks and priority sections, but generic. Does not reference specific TopRanker sprint targets or actual calendar.
issues: Synthesis subtask hit waiting_approval even though it is a report stage — GAP-002 incomplete fix (was the report stage tagged as needing approval?)
Weekly plan does not reference specific TopRanker features or sprint numbers — context not deep enough
No actual calendar integration — text plan only
gaps: Missing project-specific context in personalops deliberation

context_assessment.notes: Routed to general (no learning domain). Output quality is good — clear explanation with analogies and practice questions. But no adaptive quizzing, no session memory, no curriculum tracking.
